title: Is there a way to automatically start a new sprint at the end of the previous one?
excerpt: Also, is there a way to automatically populate the sprint timeline field with the new sprint’s dates?

posts.author: cfreemansa (Claudie Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: Also, is there a way to automatically populate the sprint timeline field with the new sprint’s dates?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

It sounds like the item default values feature could be helpful for here and then the items can show through as projects on your sprint timeline.

What do you think about this idea?
